heading: Revocation of commissions during first five years of commissioned service
label: 2141 Revocation of commissions during first five years of commissioned service
text: The Secretary, under such regulations as he may prescribe, may revoke the commission of any regular officer on active duty who, at the date of such revocation, has had less than five years of continuous service as a commissioned officer in the Regular Coast Guard.
notes: Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–282section 281 of this title2002— substituted “five” for “three” in section catchline and text.Pub. L. 107–295
